video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: England face Uruguay in a heavyweight friendly clash featuring two nations with rich footballing history and contrasting styles. England will lean on their possession play, wide creativity, and home strength, while Uruguay bring their trademark intensity, compact defending, and dangerous counter‑attacks. With both sides using the fixture to measure their readiness, this meeting promises a tight, highly engaging contest. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies, LIVE only on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: Spain and Serbia square off in a stylistic showdown, with Spain expected to dominate possession through their trademark technical precision, while Serbia counter with physicality, direct play, and strong aerial presence. Both teams view the friendly as a key test of balance and adaptability, setting the stage for a competitive encounter filled with tactical contrasts and high‑level execution. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies, LIVE only on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: Switzerland and Germany meet in a marquee international friendly that promises high‑quality football between two technically strong European sides. Switzerland will look to test their evolving structure and disciplined buildup play, while Germany arrive aiming to showcase their attacking depth and tactical sharpness ahead of a crucial year. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies, LIVE only on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: The Netherlands welcome Norway in a fascinating friendly that pits the Oranje’s fluid, attacking philosophy against Norway’s powerful, direct approach. The hosts aim to further refine their rhythm in possession, while Norway look to make a statement through physicality and transitional threat. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies, LIVE only on Sony LIV.
